title: Salty Ukrainian Pork Skillet
description: A hearty and flavorful Ukrainian-inspired dish made with pork, onions, and spices, cooked to perfection in a skillet. This recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add pork and cook until browned, about 5 minutes. Remove pork from skillet and set aside.
Add sliced onion to skillet and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add Ukrainian sausage to skillet and cook until browned, about 3 minutes.
Add flour to skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add paprika, salt, and pepper to skillet and stir to combine.
Add pork back to skillet and stir to coat with spice mixture.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 10 minutes, or until pork is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
